prompt: Create a catchy, adorable LINE sticker-ready chibi illustration based on the reference image. Use the exact same Japanese female maid observer character from the reference image, preserving her face impression, elegant pinned-up chestnut brown hair, classical black long dress, white apron collar, white apron, lace cuffs, and subdued maid headpiece. Make her a polished anime chibi with about three heads tall proportions, oversized head, compact body, and a clean readable silhouette. Show the entire full body completely inside a square 1:1 canvas with comfortable padding on all sides. Give her a graceful dynamic turning curtsy pose, body lightly twisting as if quietly spinning to notice something, one foot lifted, skirt and apron fluttering, one hand gently holding the side of the skirt, the other hand near her chest. Keep her expression calm, observant, elegant, and very cute. Use exactly one character. Use a simple plain light cream background with minimal distraction. No text, no logo, no watermark, no speech bubble, no extra characters, no cropped head, no cropped feet, no cut-off limbs, no broken hands.
